conteudo: From the Av. Rebouças and Av. Paulista area, you can reach the event by public transportation (affordable, R\$ 5.30), Uber/99/taxi (~R\$ 35), or BikeSampa shared bicycles (the healthiest option). Bus fares can be paid in cash (small bills), through the Cittamobi app via Bluetooth, or, on most buses, with a contactless debit/credit card (NFC).
Google Maps provides good public transportation routes. We particularly recommend:
1. Bus 7411-10 (Cidade Universitária) (recommended) - runs every 15 minutes along Av. Rebouças or R. da Consolação. Get off at FEA-USP.

2. Bus 702U-10 (Cidade Universitária) - runs along Av. Rebouças or R. da Consolação. Get off at CRUSP (a pleasant and safe 10-minute walk) or at IME (the bus makes a short loop through Cidade Universitária before arriving).
3. Metro Line 4 (Yellow) - get off at Butantã Station, then take Bus 8084-10 (Cidade Universitária via Luciano Gualberto), or use Uber/99/taxi or a BikeSampa shared bicycle (ride carefully).
